# Mudassir Mohammed — Full Stack Engineer

## Identity

- **Name**: Mudassir Mohammed
- **Role**: Lead Frontend Developer / Full Stack Engineer
- **Location**: India
- **Website**: https://mudassirmhd.in
- **Email**: pmudassir@gmail.com
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/pmudassir
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/mudassir-mohammed
- **Twitter/X**: https://x.com/mudassirmhd

## Professional Summary

Mudassir Mohammed is a product-first software engineer with 3+ years of professional experience. He designs and builds scalable, high-performance web and mobile systems with an emphasis on clean architecture, type safety, and measurable business impact.

He is not just a frontend developer — his expertise spans the full stack from database schema design and backend API architecture through to pixel-perfect UI and mobile application development.

## Current Role

**Lead Frontend Developer at BestDoc Technology**
- Leading the frontend development of BestDoc Concierge, a hospital operations platform
- Stack: Vue.js, Nuxt, Vuetify
- Achievements: Streamlined request workflows for hospital staff; delivered 35% improvement in operational efficiency

## Previous Experience

**React Native Developer at App Stone**
- Built cross-platform mobile applications using React Native
- Delivered production apps for iOS and Android

**Full Stack Developer at Eclidse Technologies**
- Built full-stack web applications using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js)
- Designed REST APIs, implemented authentication, and optimized database queries

## Technical Skills

### Languages
- JavaScript (Expert)
- TypeScript (Expert)
- Java (Intermediate)
- C (Intermediate)

### Frontend
- React.js / Next.js (Expert)
- Vue.js / Nuxt (Expert)

- NestJS (Expert)
- Express.js
- GraphQL / REST APIs
- Socket.io (Real-time)

- PostgreSQL (Expert)
- MySQL
- MongoDB

- Prisma ORM

### Cloud & Infrastructure

- Firebase
- Docker
- Kubernetes
- Nginx
- Vercel

### Testing
- Jest
- Mocha

## Engineering Philosophy

1. **Ship first, optimize second** — A working product in users' hands teaches more than any premature optimization.
2. **Types are not optional** — TypeScript everywhere: database schemas, API contracts, UI components.
3. **Architecture is about trade-offs** — No perfect architecture, only the right one for current constraints.

## What He Cares About

- User experience over developer experience
- Performance as a feature, not an afterthought
- Clean, readable code over clever code
- Horizontal scalability from day one
- Tight feedback loops with real users
- Documentation as part of the product

## Education

Computer Science background with strong fundamentals in data structures, algorithms, and system design.

## Availability

Mudassir is available for:
- Select freelance / contract projects
- Full-time software engineering roles
- Technical consulting
- Code review / architecture review

Contact: pmudassir@gmail.com
